## Summary

- What changed?
- Why now?
- Rollback plan if this causes issues?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test` (or explain why not run)
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (for user-flow changes)

## Risk & Rollout

- Feature flags involved:
- Data migration impact:
- Monitoring/alerting added or verified:

## Follow-ups

- Any deferred work or hardening tasks.
